policy: Only activate garments after polyester blank is sourced and product specs exist. Assets in inactive/ are staged only.

assets.notes: Baseball/cap mesh — NOT activated; wait until polyester blank sourced

ACTIVE AGAIN since 22.07.2026 (rollback — Grok/Jonny decision). Briefly replaced same-day by tee-t_shirt-white-v1 (marketplace asset), but that only painted the LARGEST sub-mesh white, leaving other sub-meshes visibly grey/textured ("Schrott"-Look) once deployed. Root cause fixed in Shirt3D.tsx (every mesh in the scene now gets painted + gets normals if missing), but Jonny/Grok chose to keep this proven single-mesh backup active rather than re-risk the marketplace asset. Camera in Shirt3D.tsx reverted to the original values for this mesh's scale. WARNING: do not run any gltf-transform/trimesh re-export on this file — a prior attempt collapsed the scene's root transform (see 'extents: 0' above, a known quirk of this specific file, not a corruption).

assets.source: Downloads/Shorts-SportOBJ.rar (objShorts.obj) — same source as the earlier shorts-sport-white-v1 attempt, re-exported by Grok 22.07.2026 night WITH baked NORMAL attribute this time (previous export lacked normals)
assets.notes: ACTIVE since 22.07.2026 night — replaces the TurboSquid Kids-Pant mesh entirely (both the plain-white and the photo-mapped version). Same tee-parity pipeline as productId 1: single MeshStandardMaterial, pure white, no photo/atlas texture, customer motif via Decal only. Adult sport-shorts silhouette (drawstring waistband, correct adult proportions), confirmed visually distinct from the kids-pant look. Camera recalibrated in Shirt3D.tsx for this mesh's centering (bbox center y≈-0.18, not 0 — camera target [0,0,0] is a slight approximation but framed acceptably per Playwright evidence in beweise/shorts-tee-parity-22-07/). Backups: inactive/shorts-white-kids-pant-backup.glb (original kids-pant), inactive/shorts-white-v1-kids-photo-last.glb (kids-pant + photo-atlas attempt, commit c684fb7). License: Shorts-Sport marketplace asset — confirm commercial rights before live sales.

INACTIVE since 22.07.2026 (was briefly live same day — see shirt-white-v2-backup notes for why it was reverted). Multi-primitive GLB: only the largest sub-mesh was being painted white by the old Shirt3D.tsx code, other sub-meshes stayed grey/textured once deployed live. Do NOT reactivate without a visual Jonny-OK, even though the Shirt3D.tsx root-cause fix (paint all meshes) now exists — it was not re-tested against this specific asset. Duplicate copy exists at inactive/shirt-white-v2-marketplace-schrott.glb (identical MD5, just renamed by Grok's revert pass — redundant, harmless). License: confirm commercial rights before live sales.
Staged fallback for productId 1, never activated. Heavier (6.7MB, ~204k verts) than tee-t_shirt-white-v1. Not wired into MODEL_PATHS. License: confirm commercial rights before live sales.

Duplicate copy exists at inactive/shorts-white-v1-marketplace-schrott.glb (identical MD5, just renamed by Grok's earlier revert pass — redundant, harmless).

policy.reason: Nur Polyester-Artikel mit gesourctem Blank aktivieren; weitere Artikel (Cap, etc.) nur library staging.

rollback_22-07.what: Marketplace tee/shorts pair (t_shirt/Shorts-Sport) was live for a few hours on 22.07.2026, then reverted back to the proven pre-existing meshes.
rollback_22-07.why: Multi-primitive GLBs only had their LARGEST sub-mesh painted white by the old Shirt3D.tsx code — other sub-meshes stayed grey/textured once deployed live ("Schrott"-Look), not visible in local single-primitive test renders.
rollback_22-07.codeFix: Shirt3D.tsx now paints every mesh in scene.traverse (not just the largest) and computes vertex normals per-mesh if missing — see git history for the exact commit.
rollback_22-07.assetDecision: Jonny/Grok chose to keep the proven backups active rather than re-risk the marketplace assets even with the code fix. Marketplace pair stays staged inactive, needs a visual Jonny-OK before any future reactivation.
rollback_22-07.seeAlso: /models/library/ready-for-claude/ (staging folder with A/B candidates + READY-MANIFEST.json, curated by Grok, not wired into MODEL_PATHS)

updated: 2026-07-22 night — shorts = adult sport mesh, tee-parity pipeline (no photo-atlas)
